LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENTS STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' MOTIONTO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOVEMBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 9, 2012 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. LILLIAN Y. TABE, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. (510) 622-2246 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute is granted because no opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/EG

Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
RESPONDENTS STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' MotionTo Dismiss For Failure To Prosecute IS Continued on the court's own motion to November 19, 2012 for the moving party to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of its moving papers with a cover letter stating the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than November 9, 2012 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
